scripts.dev: concurrently -n idp,api,web -c blue,green,yellow "npm run dev:idp" "npm run dev:api" "npm run dev:web"
scripts.test: npm run test --workspace=backend && npm run test --workspace=local-idp && npm run test --workspace=frontend
scripts.db:setup: npm run db:up && sleep 3 && npm run db:migrate && npm run db:seed
